verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Alleluia Alleluia For our Lord God Almighty reigns Alleluia Alleluia For our Lord God Almighty reigns Alleluia

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Holy Holy Are You Lord God Almighty Worthy is the Lamb Worthy is the Lamb You are Holy Holy

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Are You Lord God Almighty Worthy is the Lamb Worthy is the Lamb Amen
